Title: Rule Validation Schema
Description: This schema defines the structure for validating rules written in YAML format ensuring they are ready to be transformed into ARM json format and deployed in Microsoft Sentinel.

id.description: Stable unique identifier of the rule (UUID).

kind.description: The kind of the rule, which determines the type of analytics rule to be created in Microsoft Sentinel.

apiVersion.description: The API version to be used when deploying the rule to Microsoft Sentinel.
